title: Unfold PRIME SELECT ULTRA PLUS EDITION
description: Welcome, to The Unfold; a world plagued by shifts, causing a world of magic and agriculture to merge with the world of steampunks and astronauts.
body:
## Welcome to the Unfold!

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e23c674b73f5f1df4426714b5fad077080f36e4.png)
This is the Unfold server's modpack; it contains a nice variety of mods, keeping gameplay fun and interesting, without babying the player and vanilla experiences way too trivial and easy!

Note: We recommend allocating at least 8gb of ram

</details>

<details>

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c42a94f15986cec825c06744cdcd618bf94b41ff.png)

Important: This is the client-side version of the modpack, it doesn't contain any of the exclusively server-side mods of the Unfold to prevent bloat (such as Vanilla Tweaks, Improved mobs or Terralith), it also contains client mods that would crash the server if added.

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/49d7e086a35120fdc0e3175bfb933c8ae228b3b1.png)
